title: The Silent Visitor in My Baby Monitor
idea: I installed a new smart baby monitor in my guest room, but every night at 3:14 AM, the motion sensor triggers and records a 10-second clip of an empty room. When I analyzed the raw footage, I noticed that the light patterns on the wall shift into a specific, recurring geometric shape that isn't present during the day. I suspect the previous owner left something behind, or the wall itself is hiding a compartment, but I can't figure out the pattern's origin.
hook: Do not buy this specific smart baby monitor if you live in an older home, because mine just recorded something that shouldn't exist.
targetAudience: True crime enthusiasts, tech-savvy mystery lovers, and home DIY investigators.
viralAngle: The combination of a 'haunted' tech device and a solvable visual puzzle (the geometric shapes) forces viewers to rewatch, screenshot, and zoom in to analyze the wall patterns, driving massive comment engagement from people attempting to decode the shape.
